text: I _________ a car a few weeks ago.
explanation: ✅ ماضي بسيط: bought. ❌ buying (ing)، buy (مضارع)، buys (مضارع مفرد).
✅ last summer → ماضي: went. ❌ to go (مصدر)، going (ing)، go (مضارع).
✅ two hours ago → ماضي: had. ❌ have (مضارع)، has (مفرد)، none.

text: Yesterday morning, I ……………………. the house at 6:30.
explanation: ✅ yesterday morning → ماضي: left. ❌ leaving (ing)، leaves (مضارع)، to leave (مصدر).
✅ last night → ماضي: played. ❌ plays (مضارع)، to play (مصدر)، play (مضارع).
✅ last weekend → ماضي منفي: didn't. ❌ don't (حاضر)، doesn't (حاضر مفرد)، none.
✅ last week → ماضي: went. ❌ goes (مضارع)، go (مضارع)، going (ing).
✅ five minutes ago → ماضي: started. ❌ starting (ing)، starts (مضارع)، start (مضارع).
✅ he (مفرد) + two months ago → was. ❌ were (جمع)، is/are (حاضر).

text: We ……………………. in Mexico three years ago.
explanation: ✅ three years ago → ماضي: lived. ❌ lives (مضارع)، live (مضارع)، to live (مصدر).

text: My brother _____ a bear an hour ago.
explanation: ✅ an hour ago → ماضي: saw. ❌ to see (مصدر)، see (مضارع)، seen (تصريف ثالث).

text: ____ Mike visit his grandmother last night?
explanation: ✅ last night → سؤال ماضي: Did. ❌ Does (حاضر)، Do (حاضر)، none.
✅ did not + مصدر: work. ❌ worked (ماضي)، working (ing)، to work (مصدر مع to).

text: ____ you see Jody's new dog yesterday?
explanation: ✅ yesterday → سؤال ماضي: Did. ❌ Do/Does (حاضر)، Done (تصريف ثالث).
✅ last night → ماضي: studied. ❌ studies (مضارع)، study (مضارع)، studying (ing).

text: What did you ………………… for lunch yesterday?
explanation: ✅ Did you + مصدر: eat. ❌ ate (ماضي)، eating (ing)، eats (مضارع).
✅ yesterday → ماضي: She worked yesterday. ❌ works (حاضر)، working (ing)، worked now (تناقض زمني).

options: Did he went out with his friend?
Did he go out with her friend?
Did he go out with his friend?
Did he go out with my friend?
explanation: ✅ Did + مصدر: go out with his friend. ❌ went (خطأ)، her (غير مناسب)، my (غير مناسب).
✅ rice (أرز) – الحرف الناقص i؟ لا، rice تكتب i. لكن الخيارات a,i,o,e. الصحيح i (الخيار الثاني). سأصحح: الإجابة B (i).
✅ rice – الحرف الناقص i. ❌ a,o,e.
✅ guests – الحرف الناقص g. ❌ r,m,k.

text: What t__ppings do you want on the pizza?
explanation: ✅ toppings – الحرف الناقص o. ❌ i,e,u.

text: She won first prize in the r__ce.
explanation: ✅ race (سباق) – الحرف الناقص a. ❌ i,o,e.

text: I saw a r__ce car acci__ent last month.
explanation: ✅ race car accident – الحرفان a و d. ❌ e-m, i-v, u-t.

text: She worked hard to im__ress her teacher with her assign__nt.
explanation: ✅ impress, assignment – الحرفان s و i. ❌ f-u, p-e, l-o.

text: The ……………. was a melted chocolate bar.
explanation: ✅ topping (طبقة علوية) – شوكولاتة ذائبة كطبقة. ❌ guest (ضيف)، accident (حادث)، race (سباق).
✅ Rice (الأرز) – ينمو في مناخات دافئة. ❌ race (سباق)، console (وحدة تحكم)، assignment (واجب).

text: You are always a welcome …………….. in our house.
explanation: ✅ guest (ضيف). ❌ accident (حادث)، volleyball (كرة طائرة)، rice (أرز).

text: The teacher set an ……………………. on pollution.
explanation: ✅ assignment (واجب/مهمة). ❌ accident (حادث)، console (وحدة تحكم)، beach (شاطئ).
✅ race (سباق) – يربحه. ❌ console (وحدة تحكم)، rice (أرز)، guest (ضيف).
✅ by accident (بالصدفة). ❌ console، assignment، topping.

text: He tried to ……………… .. his teachers by doing his homework.
explanation: ✅ impress (يُعجب / يؤثر إيجاباً). ❌ go (يذهب)، stay (يبقى)، melt (يذوب).
✅ melt (يذوب) – الآيس كريم يذوب. ❌ stay (يبقى)، impress (يؤثر)، clean (ينظف).

text: My grandma became very ……………………… as she got older.
explanation: ✅ demanding (متطلبة / صعبة الإرضاء). ❌ expensive (مكلف)، spicy (حار)، common (شائع).
✅ ethnic (ثقافي / عرقي) – طعام من ثقافات مختلفة. ❌ beautiful (جميل)، interesting (ممتع)، fast (سريع).
✅ spicy (حار) – الطعام الهندي حار عادة. ❌ short (قصير)، clean (نظيف)، demanding (متطلب).

text: English is like a world-wide ……………. language.
explanation: ✅ common (شائع) – الإنجليزية لغة شائعة حول العالم. ❌ expensive (مكلف)، spicy (حار)، healthy (صحي).
